market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Spacious Entire Home in Sheldon Heights
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Sheldon Heights — a brand-new Entire Home offering luxury for 4 guests. Despite its prime location and exceptional 4.77-star rating (based on 261 reviews), this hidden gem offers a rare opportunity to capture high demand at a premium price (£315.4/night). While market competitors average £175/night, your listing has room to match the median city occupancy of 28.3% (vs your current 17.4%) while maintaining a significant pricing edge. With 74 open nights available, strategic optimization of title, photography, and amenities can unlock 80+ additional bookings yearly — representing a £1,567 ($2,000) revenue increase. No amenities listed yet? Prioritize outdoor space, parking accessibility, and entertainment features to justify the 80% premium over market rates.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space with river views (common in 62% of local listings)
Designated off-street parking (45% of competitors offer this)
WiFi + premium streaming capabilities (81% include entertainment tech)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Start with an exterior shot of the building from Sheldon Road intersection — 83% of local bookings prioritize property visibility in the first photo.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate exceeds market median by 80% (£315.4 vs £175) while occupancy lags by 11% (17.4% vs 28.3%)
Missing 74 open nights represents lost revenue potential of £23,272 ($30,000) over 90 days
Title lacks capacity/emphasis on ratings (4.77) despite being new-to-market property
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £315.4 rate is 80% above market median while occupancy (17.4%) trails neighborhood average by 11 percentage points — optimization could unlock 80+ nights.
